✦ CODEX FRAGMENT
DECLARE ALLEGIANCE

Currently: NEUTRAL

The faction war runs across every planet. Pick a side — your choice changes how NPCs treat you and how the war reacts to your presence in contested zones. You can switch sides later (after a brief cooldown).

ORDER speaks of preserving the lattice — geometry, structure, the Architect's will. VOID speaks of breaking false structures — curved thought, freedom from the grid. Neither is objectively right.

SECTOR ANOMALY SCAN

Scanning sector...

DISCOVERED PLACES

No bookmarks yet. Land on a planet to save your location automatically.

THE MISSING CODEX

Scan worlds to find fragments. Land to recover them.

LEAD
DRUMS
FLIGHT MANUAL

LEFT STICK — Steering. Push to turn or pitch the nose.

RIGHT STICK — Thrust. Up=accelerate, down=reverse/brake, outer ring=boost. Left/right=strafe.

BOOST ⏵⏵ — Hold for max forward thrust.

REVERSE ⏴ — Hold to brake or back up.

TAP A PLANET — Locks on. Fly toward it to enter the surface.

DOUBLE-TAP A LOCKED PLANET — Warp to it.

ESC — Exit cockpit or leave a planet's surface.

KEYBOARD — WASD to thrust/strafe, Q/E to roll, Shift to boost, mouse to look (in fullscreen).
